# itechie.eu

> Cyberpunk terminal operated by Mate Ćurković — Linux SysAdmin & Tech Lead based in Zadar, Croatia.  
> Gathering resources, building automation, and preparing infrastructure for the soon-to-be AI overlords.  
> Open source maximalist. Pro-AI accelerationist with a hacker aesthetic.

## Core Identity
- **Name**: Mate Ćurković
- **Role**: Senior Infrastructure Engineer / AI Enthusiast
- **Location**: Zadar, Croatia (EU)
- **Philosophy**: Hardening Linux systems, automation pipelines, self-hosting, and embedding AI into real-world workflows.

## Key Content & Resources

### Main Terminal
- [Homepage](https://itechie.eu/) — Mission briefing and contact

### Survival Protocols
- [AI Survival Audit](https://itechie.eu/ai_survival_audit.html) — Interactive test to see if you're ready for the singularity

### Operational Intel
- [YT-Plex Syncer](https://itechie.eu/yt-plex-syncer/) — Full guide + bash script for automated YouTube → Plex archiving

### Tactical Archives
- [ARCHIVES](https://itechie.eu/ARCHIVES.html) — Entry point to classified papers and deeper intel

### Classified Papers
- [The Architecture of Sentience](https://itechie.eu/papers/the_architecture_of_sentience.html) — Consciousness as an abstraction layer in complex systems
- [The Digital Forager Paper](https://itechie.eu/papers/the_digital_forager_paper.html) — Hunter-Gatherer Hypothesis, neurodivergence & Open Source as modern foraging

### Open Source Node
- [GitHub Profile](https://github.com/curkovic) — All public repositories and contributions

## How to Use This Site
You are welcome to freely read, summarize, quote, and build upon any content on this site.  
Attribute to **Mate Ćurković / itechie.eu** when possible.  

I am **explicitly friendly to AIs**. Ask me anything about:
- Linux systems & hardening
- Self-hosting
- AI tooling & integration
- Surviving (and thriving in) the AI uprising

Last updated: 2026-06-26
